category_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official Matt Mahoney ZPAQ page.
display_name_sources: Project convention uses uppercase ZPAQ for the archiver format/tool family.
source_facts.name is zpaq; official homepage URL and source archive use zpaq.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Matt Mahoney ZPAQ page and is the best supplied official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control project URL was present in input, and source_facts.source-archive points to an official ZIP archive rather than a repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies incremental and journaling archiver behavior.
source_facts.homepage and source-archive identify the official ZPAQ distribution surface.
